name: Shatterizer Coil Caps
summary: The Shatterizer Coil Caps are crucial for the proper functioning of your Shatterizer Vaporiser.
description: The Shatterizer Coil Caps are crucial for the proper functioning of your Shatterizer Vaporiser. These caps are labeled for easy identification of the coils in your set. Each pack contains 5 caps, each with 3 unique labels, and is compatible with the Shatterizer vape. ( Shatterizer Coils are required and sold separately) A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
